configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: if exist .env (set NODE_ENV=development&& set SUPABASE_URL=&& set SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=&& set OPENAI_API_KEY=&& set GEMINI_API_KEY=&& node --env-file=.env --import tsx server/index.ts) else (set NODE_ENV=development&& set SUPABASE_URL=&& set SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=&& set OPENAI_API_KEY=&& set GEMINI_API_KEY=&& node --import tsx server/index.ts)
